entry.title: Music recommendation & review#1
entry.content:
A shooting star in pop music industry

WHO IS XG?

Introduction

XG (acronym for Xtraordinary Girls) is a Japanese hip-hop & RnB girl group belongs to AVEX but based in South Korea, which has 7 members (the eldest is born in 2002 and the youngest born in 2005). Names sorted by age from oldest to youngest are as follow: Chisa, Hinata, Jurin, Harvey, Julia, Maya, Cocona. They made their debut on March 18, 2022, with the release of the digital single “Tippy Toes”.

Career (2022 - Present)

NameDateType
Tippy Toes2022.5.18Single
Mascara2022.6.29Single
Shooting Star2023.1.25Single
New DNA2023.6.30Mini album
Winter Without You2023.12.8Single
Woke Up2024.5.24Single

On March 18, 2022, XG made their debut with the release of their all English-language digital single “Tippy Toes”. On June 29, they released their second all English-language single titled “Mascara”, followed by their first television appearance on South Korean Mnet’s M Countdown performing the single. On November 17, XG released a rap cypher video entitled Galz Xypher (Galz Xypher#2). The video became viral on a TikTok through an XG fan account, gaining over 15 million views on the platform.

On January 25, 2023, XG released their third all English-language single, “Shooting Star” along with its music video and an additional track, “Left Right”. On March 6, XG entered the Media base US Radio Top 40, becoming the first female Japanese artist and the first Japanese group to do so. On June 30, XG released “Grl Gvng” accompanied by its music video, as a pre-release single preceding their debut EP New DNA. On August 4, XG released “TGIF” accompanied by its music video, as the second pre-release single to their debut EP New DNA. On August 23, XG released “New Dance” accompanied by its music video, as the third and final pre-release single to their debut EP New DNA. On September 27, XG’s debut EP New DNA was released alongside its lead single “Puppet Show“, accompanied by its music video. The EP was certified gold by the Recording Industry Association of Japan (RIAJ) for shipments of over 100,000 copies.

WHY RECOMMEND XG?

XG’s first surge in popularity was due to “Shooting Star” and “Left Right”. Even though they already posted 2 singles, their make-ups and concepts were similar to other KPOP groups. In other words, they had not discovered their own unique characteristics. However, in “Shooting Star” and “Left Right”, the music perfectly struck a chord with the audience’s hearts while embracing the millennial retro trend. To me, another reason that can’t ignore is there lyrics are English, which is more easier for audience to listen, remember and perform.

The lyrics in “Shooting Star” vividly depicted their trainee experience: “Always lookin’ fresh, got that green in my diet”, “Everything I do, I do it A1, flawless” sang by Jurin; “Babe, if I give it my all, will it pay off? Workin’ overtime, no days off” by Chisa; “Now I’m goin’ up, headin’ to the stars. Wouldn’t trade it out for another life” by Julia. These lyrics also perfectly showcase the team’s efforts to achieve their dreams and their pride of being one of the team. In past 7 years, they devoted countless effort in practice, encountered with numerous psychological and life challenges, as well as a brutal elimination process. Now, these seven wolves can stand on the spotlighted stage and calmly yet proudly singing:“It’s a big move, every day’s like a dream, Makin’ big moves, yeah, we do it for our team, Ooh, ah, I’m lookin’ so lavish, Ooh, ah, yeah, I bet you can’t imagine.” What’s more, the dance performance can kill every KPOP girl group. Since I know shit about dance, I recommend this video for better understanding of their dance and why they outperform other peers.

“New DNA” was a bold and successful endeavor on the integration of concept and musicality together with visual performance. Before this, the continuity of the concept and the diversity of the music in this album were unimaginable. I am going to explain this point of view from the storyline and soundtracks.

The story: 7 Aliens landed on Earth

We have start with “Hesonoo”, in Japanese, it means “umbilical cord”. It is also the slogan of the group, representing their their closely connected lives and emotions. Next up is the song “x-gene”, the two songs symbolize the awakening of extraterrestrial beings and the closely-knit team relationship; “Puppet Show” tells the story of them breaking free from their restraints; “Grl Gvng” is more like a superhero movie. This song intends to express their own incomparable strength and issue a severe warning to their enemies; “TGIF” and “New Dance” tells the story of the experiences and encounters of seven extraterrestrials after landing on Earth. Overall, it revolves around the theme of female self-awareness awakening, while blending in the typical hard-edged style of hip-hop. Truly, those girl groups, IVE, NMIXX, ITZY, LE SSERAFIM, GIDLE are all playing such thing. However, it seems lack of credibility when those girls dressed in revealing outfits, with altered faces, performing lackluster dances, sing songs telling women not to care about others’ gazes, all I know is they are playing with females’ trust and trying to make genuine money by relying on these hollow elements.

The music and performance: Can’t stop dancing!

Woke Up: A true revolution in the history of girl group

entry.title: Trip in Nanjing
entry.content:
What we did in the weekend?

Basically, we didn’t decide to take outdoor activities at daytime (even at nighttime) due to the extreme hot climate. Thus, we turned out vision to indoor activities. And, to me, Nanjing is a city which has enormous delicious food, so I took my friends to have those splendid dishes, mainly.

1. Noodle

Recently, Nanjing’s noodle is very popular not only for the astonishing appearance (a huge pot-stewed meat) but also for its complex and amazing taste. We went to a noodle shop near Nanjing University (actually, Southeast University and Nanjing University both at same street) which is famous due to the large meatball where a salted yolk hide in it.

You can see from the picture, this costed me 46 yuan, which is quite expensive. However, the taste matched its price. It is too delicious that I have difficulty finding proper words to precisely describe it.

2. Duck

There’s a saying that roasted duck in Nanjing is the origin of Beijing roasted duck. I am 100% willing to believe that be a truth. The reason is simple: I don’t like the roasted duck being too greasy, and Nanjing roasted duck just at the balance point of fatty and dry. The soul of duck is the sweet- and-salty sauce. Dipping a piece of duck in the sauce can improve the taste and make the duck meat becomes much more tender. Sadly, my friends seemed not a fan of it. They preferred steamed rice roll.

3. Dishes

We went to the top restaurant in Nanjing. Cuisines here are more sweeter than other places. The restaurant become crowded at 11 am which is truly scare to see.

This is my fav.

Who can image pig’s kidney can be a dish?

4. Gallery

Can’t understand the mind of artists.

entry.title: Academic discussion#1
entry.content: I totally agree with Paul’s idea that government should not set automobile-free zone in city center , not only for the concern of businesses but also for the convenience of individuals. Since the center of a city is the core of local economy, politics and culture, it has to be capable of handling large quantity of people who come here for business efficiently. For Claire’s opinion, it is true that we have to work together to decrease the emit of carbon dioxide. However, automobile-free zone is not the only choice since we already found and invented the alternative of conventional petrol. What’s more, only pedestrian could turn city center becoming crowded and then increasing the risk of the occurrence of severe accidents. A street full of people can have negative influence on those who try to enjoy the shopping.
